name: Guide
dialogueStart: I'm the town Guide. Let me give you a task.
Go and chop 3 logs from a nearby tree.
Return to me with them for a reward!
dialogueInProgress: You need to chop 3 logs from a nearby tree.
Come back once you have them.
dialogueReadyToComplete: You got the logs! Well done, adventurer!
As promised, here is your reward.
dialogueComplete: Feel free to browse my wares.
